title: Robin Boards the Sea Train
description: The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Kokoro, Nico Robin, Nami, Iceburg, Paulie. The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Prepare for departure to Enies Lobby!!!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: The ruins of galley-La company head- quarters

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin doesn't hate us after all ________

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Hey, it turned into a tanuki.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: W~wah!! It turned into a gorilla _____!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I have to convince Nico Robin myself....!!!

summary: The rescue force launches into the storm after the Sea Train, beginning the road to Enies Lobby.
